name: @forgeax/game-cow-survivor
description: Cow-Level Survivor — Vampire-Survivors-like 3D bullet-survival sample. Roguelike weapons, wave spawner, XP gems, kill FX, screen shake, floating combat text. Loaded by apps/preview via loadGame dynamic import.

bundle-size.reason: sample game bundle is downstream of the host app (apps/preview)

fps.reason: sample game has no independent smoke gate

bench.reason: sample game; bench focus stays on engine packages

gate.reason: no CI gate on sample games; apps/preview hosts acceptance
